seeds.value: Define your UX research priorities here. Example: Q1: Reduce onboarding drop-off by 20%. Q2: Improve feature discoverability. Q3: Optimize mobile experience. Q4: Accessibility audit.
seeds.description: Current UX research goals -- used to focus feedback analysis and prioritize findings

seeds.value: Create a ux_findings record when a pain point has 5+ independent user signals across feedback, analytics, or support tickets.
seeds.description: Threshold for when to create a formal UX finding
